description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and a global before_script that logs in to Docker Hub with the yamalight user. Define variables CLIENT_TEST_IMAGE, CLIENT_RELEASE_IMAGE, SERVER_TEST_IMAGE, SERVER_RELEASE_IMAGE and four stages: build, test, release, deploy. In the build stage add a build-client job that runs docker build --pull -t $CLIENT_TEST_IMAGE ./client then docker push $CLIENT_TEST_IMAGE, and a build-server job that runs docker build --pull -t $SERVER_TEST_IMAGE ./server then docker push $SERVER_TEST_IMAGE. In the test stage add a test-client job that pulls $CLIENT_TEST_IMAGE and runs docker run -e TZ=Europe/Berlin $CLIENT_TEST_IMAGE npm test, and a test-server job that starts a rethinkdb container named expertsdb, pulls $SERVER_TEST_IMAGE, and runs docker run --link expertsdb:expertsdb -e EXPERTS_DB_URL=expertsdb $SERVER_TEST_IMAGE npm test. In the release stage add release-client and release-server jobs that only run on the master branch, each pulling their respective test image, tagging it to the release image variable, and pushing the release tag. Finally, add a manual deploy job that only runs on master, with a before_script installing openssh, starting ssh-agent, adding the $SSH_PRIVATE_KEY, configuring SSH to skip host checking, and then ssh-ing to root@codezen.net to execute "cd /root/bpwjs.deploy; make deploy".
